title: gentianella nummulariifolia
intro: Gentianella nummulariifolia is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family, commonly known as a small, annual or biennial herb with yellow flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Gentianella nummulariifolia include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Gentianella nummulariifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, with the dried roots and flowers being the most commonly used parts.
